hero.title: Welcome to Mira Bistro
hero.description: QR menu experience and modern restaurant management system.

about.label: About
about.title: A Story Full of Flavor
about.description: At Mira Bistro, we serve our guests dishes prepared with the freshest ingredients in a warm and welcoming atmosphere. We bring quality to every detail and passion to every plate.
about.featureIngredientsDesc: We use fresh and local products every day.
about.featureChefsDesc: Our experienced chefs create unique flavors.
about.featureGuestsDesc: Your satisfaction is always our priority.

qr.label: QR Menu System
qr.title: Accessing Our Menu Is So Easy!
qr.description: Scan the QR code on your table to instantly access our menu and explore all our flavors from your phone.
qr.step1Desc: Scan the QR code with your phone camera.
qr.step2Desc: Browse all food and drink options.

menuPage.label: Mira Bistro Menu
menuPage.title: Discover Our Flavors
menuPage.description: Browse our carefully prepared dishes and discover your favorite flavors.

menu.title: Mira Bistro Menu
menu.subtitle: Discover our flavors prepared with fresh ingredients.

footer.tagline: We combine modern gastronomy with warm atmosphere and refined presentation.

adminLogin.description: Sign in to manage menu, tables, and QR codes.
adminLogin.demoText: The real authentication system will be enabled after Supabase auth integration.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Welcome back to Mira Bistro admin panel.

hero.label: About Us
hero.title: Bringing Together Taste, Atmosphere and Hospitality
hero.description: Mira Bistro is a refined bistro experience offering modern flavors in a warm, elegant and welcoming atmosphere.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: Care in Every Plate, Elegance in Every Detail
story.description1: At Mira Bistro, our goal is not only to serve food, but to create a pleasant, high-quality and memorable experience for our guests.
story.description2: With fresh ingredients, balanced recipes and thoughtful presentation, we aim to maintain the same quality every day.

chef.label: Our Kitchen Team
chef.title: There Is Passion Behind the Taste
chef.description: Our experienced kitchen team carefully prepares each plate by interpreting classic flavors with modern techniques.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: Not Just Food, a Complete Atmosphere
experience.description: With bright interiors, calm music, attentive service and a balanced menu, we offer guests a relaxed and premium setting.

cta.title: Discover the Mira Bistro Experience
cta.description: Explore our menu or let us reserve a special table for you.

hero.label: Gallery
hero.title: Discover the Mira Bistro Atmosphere
hero.description: Selected moments reflecting the Mira Bistro experience, from our dishes to interior details.

cta.title: Experience It in Person
cta.description: We invite you to discover the warm atmosphere and signature flavors of Mira Bistro.

hero.label: Contact
hero.title: Get in Touch with Mira Bistro
hero.description: Contact us for reservations, events, or private dining experiences.

hours.label: Opening Hours
hours.title: A Special Experience Every Day
hours.description: Mira Bistro welcomes guests every day of the week.

cta.title: Your Table Awaits
cta.description: Reserve your table for an unforgettable evening at Mira Bistro.

hero.label: Reservation
